hypothesis: Market-neutral relative-value or relative-momentum trades across economically related non-US pairs may add return density without the incumbent directional beta.

engine_contract.entry: Next synchronized M15 bar open after a completed divergence window.
engine_contract.sizing: Equal ATR risk per leg with opposite directions.
engine_contract.same_bar_rule: Joint adverse extremes trigger stop before joint favorable extremes trigger target.

selection_contract.holdout_open_rule: Open 2024-2025 only for the single global mode/pair winner if every preholdout gate passes.
selection_contract.holdout_pass_rule: At least 50 trades, PF >= 1.10, positive pooled net R, and positive 2024 and 2025 net R.

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
